scripts.build: bun run generate && bun run build:agent-runner && bun run build:web && bun run build:go
scripts.build:go: mkdir -p bin && rm -rf cmd/openhive/web_dist && cp -r web/dist cmd/openhive/web_dist && CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -o bin/openhive ./cmd/openhive
scripts.build:agent-runner: cd agent-runner && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run build
scripts.build:web: cd web && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run build
scripts.check: bun run generate && bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.test: bun run test:go && bun run test:agent-runner && bun run test:web
scripts.test:agent-runner: cd agent-runner && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run test
scripts.test:web: cd web && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run test
scripts.lint: bun run lint:go && bun run lint:agent-runner && bun run lint:web
scripts.lint:agent-runner: cd agent-runner && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run lint
scripts.lint:web: cd web && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run lint
scripts.coverage: bun run coverage:go && bun run coverage:agent-runner && bun run coverage:web
scripts.coverage:go: mkdir -p coverage && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test ./... -coverprofile=coverage/go.out -count=1 && go tool cover -func=coverage/go.out
scripts.coverage:agent-runner: mkdir -p coverage && cd agent-runner && bun run test:coverage
scripts.coverage:web: mkdir -p coverage && cd web && bun run test:coverage
scripts.dev: mkdir -p cmd/openhive/web_dist && touch cmd/openhive/web_dist/.gitkeep && bun run build:agent-runner && go run ./cmd/openhive
scripts.docker:build: docker build -t openhive-team -f deployments/Dockerfile.team . && docker build -t openhive -f deployments/Dockerfile .
scripts.clean: rm -rf bin/ coverage/ agent-runner/dist/ agent-runner/node_modules/ web/dist/ web/node_modules/
